zh.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: 德國薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯

zh.Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alp: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯阿斯普雷蒙特
zh.Aspremont, Nice, Alpes-Maritimes, Proven: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯阿斯普雷蒙特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroi II d'Aspremont於大約1197年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯阿斯普雷蒙特時，他的父親Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I36歲，母親Elisabeth de Dampierre39歲。他於1214年與Lauretta van Saarbrücken在德國薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年1月在敘利亞艾爾 庫納t拉曼斯u拉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroi II d'Aspremont于大约1197年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯阿斯普雷蒙特时，他的父亲Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I36岁，母亲Elisabeth de Dampierre39岁。他于1214年与Lauretta van Saarbrücken在德国薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年1月在叙利亚艾爾 庫納t拉曼斯u拉享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroi II d'Aspremont was born about 1197, in Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, was 36 and his mother, Elisabeth de Dampierre, was 39. He married Lauretta van Saarbrücken in 1214, in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in January 1250, in Manşūrah, Al Qunayţirah, Syria, at the age of 54.

fr.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroi II d'Aspremont est né environ 1197, à Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Dampierre, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Lauretta van Saarbrücken en 1214, à Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en janvier 1250, à Manşūrah, Al Qunayţirah, Syrie, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroi II d'Aspremont um 1197 in Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I 36 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Dampierre 39. Er hat 1214 in Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Deutschland Lauretta van Saarbrücken geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb im Januar 1250 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Manşūrah, Al Qunayţirah, Syrien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi II d'Aspremont è nato il circa 1197 nel Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Dampierre, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Lauretta van Saarbrücken nel 1214, nel Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel gennaio 1250, nel Manşūrah, Al Qunayţirah, Siria, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroi II d'Aspremontが約1197年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-マリティメスアスプレモントで生まれた時，父Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun Iは36歳，母Elisabeth de Dampierreは39歳であった。1214年にドイツサアルランドクレイス サアルブルuクンサアルブルuクンでLauretta van Saarbrückenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年1月にシリアアル クナイtイラマンsuラで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroi II d'Aspremont(이)가 대략 1197년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-마이팀스 아스프렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Dampierre(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1214년 독일 사알랜드 크레이스 사아르브uc켄 사아르브uc켄에서 Lauretta van Saarbrücken(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 1월 시리아 앨 크나이t이라 먼su라에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi II d'Aspremont nasceu aproximadamente 1197, em Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Dampierre, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Lauretta van Saarbrücken em 1214, em Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1250, em Manşūrah, Al Qunayţirah, Síria, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroi II d'Aspremont родился около 1197 г. в местности аспремонт, алпес-маритимесь, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Dampierre, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Lauretta van Saarbrücken в 1214 г. в местности саарбрuккен, крис саарбрuккен, саарланд, Германия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер январь 1250 г. в местности манsuрах, аль кунеиtирах, Сирия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroi II d'Aspremont nació aproximadamente 1197, en Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Dampierre, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Lauretta van Saarbrücken en 1214, en Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en enero de 1250, en Manşūrah, Al Qunayţirah, Siria, a la edad de 54 años.
